name: claude-superpack
description: Token-efficient multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code with auto-classification, parallel subagent execution, conflict-aware routing, and structured merge coordination.

interface.shortDescription: Token-efficient multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: Claude Superpack v2 adds intelligent auto-routing, token-efficient context management, and multi-agent orchestration to Claude Code. It classifies every request (direct answer, single-agent, parallel, or serial complex), spawns isolated subagent workers via the Agent tool or safe-summon runner, detects write-surface conflicts, and merges results through a structured coordination pipeline. Designed for production-grade reliability with minimal token waste.
defaultPrompt: Fix a bug, add tests, and update docs safely.
Refactor the auth module across all consumers.
Run parallel workers with isolated worktrees.
Implement this feature using the most efficient approach.
